Since 2012, K-DESIGN AWARD has celebrated creativity and innovation, honoring designers who shape the future of global design.
A decade of leading global design trends
01 - 08
 
The K-Design Award is renowned for strict judging and a top winner program, showcasing 14,000+ designers globally and pledging lasting recognition for all winners.

Since 2012, K-DESIGN AWARD has celebrated creativity and innovation, honoring designers who shape the future of global design.

THE WORLD'S BEST : K-DESIGN AWARD

showcasing 14,000+ designers globally and pledging lasting
recognition for all winners.
